summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Founder Copilot MVP with landing page and dashboard. All core features are working correctly with minor intermittent LLM generation issues.

intermittent_issues.issue: Occasional LLM generation failures with 'Failed to generate plan' error
intermittent_issues.impact: Some valid startup queries fail intermittently

performance_notes.impact: Users may perceive slow response times
performance_notes.note: This is expected for complex LLM generation

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Working - Health check returns correct message
✅ Working - Correctly blocks joke and poem requests
✅ Working - Generates structured responses with all required fields
✅ Working - Aggressive, budget, and regenerate modifiers functional
✅ Working - Both POST and GET operations successful

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent failures show 'Failed to generate plan' error

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero title 'Turn Startup Ideas Into Execution Plans'
Navigation 'Launch App' button works correctly
Features section displays 'Not a Chatbot. An Execution Engine.' title
4 feature cards displayed (AI-Powered Execution, Structured Output, Startup-Focused, Smart Refinements)
CTA section with 'Ready to Execute?' and 'Launch Founder Copilot' button working
Navigation to dashboard from landing page working
Dashboard sidebar with Dashboard and History navigation links
Dashboard shows 'AI Founder Copilot' title and input area
All 4 workflow buttons working (Validate Idea, Plan Growth, Weekly Plan, Fix Sales Funnel)
Workflow buttons correctly auto-fill textarea with appropriate prompts
Guardrail test blocks 'Tell me a joke' with 'Out of scope' message
Guardrail test blocks 'Write me a poem' with 'Out of scope' message
Valid startup queries generate structured cards (Strategy, Actions, Risks, Execution Plan, Insight, Confidence)
All 6 output cards display correctly when LLM responds successfully
Smart action buttons present (Regenerate, Make it more aggressive, Reduce budget)
Loading state with skeleton cards works correctly
Logo click returns to landing page
Backend health check endpoint working
Backend guardrail endpoints working correctly
Backend status endpoints (POST/GET) working
Backend modifier functionality working
Response structure validation - all required JSON fields present
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate intermittent LLM generation failures. About 5-10% of valid startup queries are failing with 'Failed to generate plan' error. This could be due to API rate limits, network timeouts, or LLM service availability. Consider adding retry logic or better error handling.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (22/23 tests passed - 1 intermittent LLM generation issue)
